hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: The basket shows elevated volatility (0.38‑0.54) and mostly negative composites and alphas. Beta is at or above market for most legs, meaning the portfolio is sensitive to broader crypto swings. Signals for BTC, ETH, SOL and LTC are all fragile – small adverse moves could flip the modest convictions. To preserve capital we adopt a defensive stance and trim exposure modestly across the board, with the deepest cuts on SOL and LTC where the long bias is weakest and the alpha most negative.

counsellors.openai: **Overall:** Cautious/neutral posture is warranted. Signals are predominantly flat or negative, while SOL and ETH carry high volatility and beta, creating asymmetric downside if crypto sentiment weakens. Avoid increasing aggregate exposure absent stronger composite confirmation.
